subcodes.first_line: O you who are growing firm! In this day, the hosts of the Concourse on High aid and assist blessed souls who arise to teach the Cause
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت نابت الیوم جنود ملا اعلی ناصر و معین نفوس مبارکی است که به تبلیغ قیام
subcodes.subjects: @travels to the West by Abdu'l-Baha, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause
